texto: And so back to Cassie: who was she? Part of the deception
autor: just a friend or something else…perhaps it was time to find out.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de just a friend or something else…perhaps it was time to find out. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “And so back to Cassie: who was she? Part of the deception”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, melanie-cusick-jones, cassie, com foco em reflexao.
